title: More Gears
description: This mod added more Tier of Tools, Armors and Weapons to Minecraft. The highest tier is indestructible.
body:
# More Tools and Armor

## What It Does
More Tools and Armor is a Minecraft expansion mod that introduces brand-new materials, ores, tools, and armor sets to radically transform your gameplay. This mod doesn’t just add new items—it reinvents how you interact with the game by providing:

- **Six New Ores:** Including two deepslate variants that add depth to your mining adventures.
- **Six Unique Tool and Armor Types:** Each set is designed with unique mechanics such as enhanced durability, specialized combat benefits, and tailored mining capabilities.
- **Six New Ingots and a Custom Recipe Mechanic:** A fresh recipe system for crafting these ingots unlocks new crafting paths and strategies.

## Why Download It
- **Innovative Gameplay:** Discover new combat dynamics and resource management strategies with tools that offer specialized abilities and armor that provides strategic benefits (eg. Fireproof, Unbreakable, Immune to Lightning, etc.).
- **Enhanced Exploration and Adventure:** Whether you’re battling mobs, mining for rare resources, or exploring the vast Minecraft world, the additional materials and unique mechanics ensure that every play session feels fresh and challenging.
- **Seamless Integration:** With built-in support for JEI and REI, you can easily track recipes and experiment with the new crafting system without disrupting your gameplay flow.

## Other Critical Information
- **Wiki Page:** Visit our [Wiki Page](https://github.com/CoolerProYT/MoreGears/wiki) for more information about the mod.
- **Plugin Support:** Compatible with JEI and REI for a smooth user experience.
- **Bug Reporting:** If you encounter any issues, please visit our [Github Issue Page](https://github.com/CoolerProYT/MoreGears/issues) for support and to help us improve the mod.

Elevate your Minecraft experience with More Tools and Armor—a mod designed for players who crave innovative mechanics and fresh challenges in every game session. Enjoy mining, crafting, and combat like never before!
